name: Turkey Casserole Spectacular
recipeIngredient: 1 6 oz package of wild and long-grain rice mix
3 cups cooked turkey (or chicken), cut into 1-inch pieces
1 can French-style green beans, drained (15-1/2 oz)
1 can condensed cream of celery soup (10-3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 2-quart shallow baking dish lightly.
3. Mix all ingredients together in the casserole dish until well blended. You can wrap and refrigerate at this point if making ahead.
4. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
